testsuite.name: practice.AddToCardTest

testcase.name: addToCartTest
testcase.system-out: The products has been added to the cart sucessfully || True

testsuite.system-out: --Executing before Suite-- --Executing before Test-- Login Successfull --Executing After Method-- The products has been added to the cart sucessfully || True --Executing After Method-- --Executing After Test-- --Executing After Suite--
